title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 11–14, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Mayor Boodle, Unknown person #3, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: COULD THE KID WITH THE BELLY- BAND HAVE SURVIVED THAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THAT'S ONE HECK OF AN ALARM CLICK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HOW COULD ANYONE LIVE THROUGH THAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I CAN'T TAKE ANY MORE! I WON'T LOSE A SECOND TOWN TO THOSE SEA RATS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THESE PIRATES SHOW UP, THINK THEY CAN DO AS THEY PLEASE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: BUT I WON'T LET 'EM WREECK FORTY YEARS OF HARD WORK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I WON'T TAKE THIS SITTING DOWN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Getting yourself killed won't accomplish anything! You're being reckless!!

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
